nodes.label: Print Templates: Packing Slip (S10-b) + Retailer Order Copy (S11)
nodes.description: Design render showing two printable A4 order documents side-by-side. Top: S10-b packing slip / warehouse copy (no prices) — monochrome, no fills, Qty column 30pt mono right-aligned, names verbatim/wrapping/never-truncated, empty notes box dropped. Bottom: S11 retailer order copy (same skeleton + RATE/AMOUNT/TOTAL columns, header badge flips to ORDER COPY to prevent misfiling, GST-inclusive rates, no tax lines). Both share: GANPATI ENTERPRISES header, order ORD-2026-1042, salesman Raju, retailer Sharma Electronics Sadar Bazaar, 3 line items (Micro Usb Cable x10, Adaptor x5, BT Speaker x2), delivery note, Packed-by/Checked-by signature lines, printed timestamp. S11 adds: ₹ rates, per-line amounts, TOTAL ₹4,478.

nodes.label: S10-b: Packing Slip (Warehouse Copy — No Prices)
nodes.description: Warehouse/packing copy of an order. Shows QTY + ITEM columns only (no rates or amounts). Qty column: 30pt mono, right-aligned for arm's-length readability. Item names verbatim, wrapping, never truncated. Notes box present only when notes exist (empty notes drops the box). Monochrome, no fills. Footer: GANPATI ENTERPRISES · ORDER CAPTURE, printed timestamp, page N of N. Signature lines: Packed by / Checked by.

nodes.label: S11: Retailer Order Copy (With Prices)
nodes.description: Retailer-facing print copy of an order. Same skeleton as S10-b but adds RATE and AMOUNT columns plus a TOTAL line. Header badge reads ORDER COPY (vs ORDER CAPTURE) to prevent warehouse/retailer misfiling. Shows: company name, order ID, submitted datetime, retailer name + address + phone, salesman name, line items with GST-inclusive rates and computed amounts, total, notes, signature lines. No separate tax lines shown.

nodes.label: Print Template Design Decisions
nodes.description: Explicit design annotations visible in render: (1) Qty column 30pt mono, right-aligned — arm's-length readability for warehouse use. (2) Item names verbatim, wrapping, never truncated. (3) Empty notes field => box is dropped entirely. (4) Monochrome, no fills. (5) Header badge flips between ORDER CAPTURE and ORDER COPY so paper copies can't be misfiled. (6) GST-inclusive rates, no tax lines. (7) Prices on for retailer copy, prices off for packing slip.
